flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Saint Mary-of-the-Woods College fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 37.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Mary-of-the-Woods College fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (62.3% → 46.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Saint Mary-of-the-Woods College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (73.7% → 61.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Mary-of-the-Woods College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.4k → $35.3k).
